positive: A stylized, highly detailed graphic of a cosmic forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent flora with glowing edges anchor the composition, surrounding a central pathway illuminated by a soft, ethereal nebula glow. The trees have sleek, geometric silhouettes resembling crystalline structures, and the ground is covered in stylized, glowing moss. The color palette is deep midnight blue, vibrant electric cyan, and soft neon lavender, contrasted by stark black negative space for maximum apparel printing effect. High contrast, clean lines, vector-art aesthetic, UHD digital illustration, central composition, symmetrical balance.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signature, poor composition, bad anatomy, out of frame, extra limbs
